creator: olivierd@FreeBSD.org
text:
With latest update of devel/libsoup (2.40.3), Midori can't load web page. It freezes.

I tested differents releases of www/webkit-gtk2 (1.4.3, 1.6.3, and 1.8.3), and I get same problem:

libsoup-CRITICAL **: soup_session_send_request_async: assertion `use_thread_context' failed

Someone mentions another browser, http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-gnome/2013-March/028265.html
